title: SEARCH 1 — Family approaches, Ginger looks innocent
prompt: Wide low-angle shot in @backyard-kitchen, soft afternoon sunlight. @Sara on the LEFT stops on the lawn looking suspiciously toward the flowerbed. @Eva on the RIGHT stops beside her sister, hands on hips. @Ginger sits in the CENTER of the frame near the petunias trying to look innocent — eyes huge, ears perked, tail unmoving, a tiny patch of dirt on her snout. Sara (squinting): "Hmmm…" Eva: "Something happened here!" Playful suspense music.
